hooks.prompt: Load sales context: read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/data/2-Domaines/sales-profile.json if it exists. Use it to initialize the Sales session (quota, target segment, ICP, fiscal year settings).
Run antislop quality check on the content just generated. Check for banned words (delve, tapestry, game-changer, unleash, elevate, demystify, revolutionize, synergy) and rewrite any found.

PostToolUse._note: Standalone mode only. When Solo is installed, antislop is managed centrally in Solo hooks.json.

hooks.command: echo 'Trigger: run reality-checker — validate RFP assumptions after GO/borderline score'

PostToolUse._note: When Sentinel installed, auto-runs reality-checker after GO/borderline RFP score.

hooks.command: echo 'Trigger: run win-loss-analyst-agent — full post-mortem after win-loss-analyzer skill completes'

PostToolUse._note: Auto-triggers full post-mortem agent after win-loss-analyzer skill completes.
